subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. We’d be glad to continue the partnership conversation. Please send a few 30-minute time options for next week that work for your team, and we can coordinate from there.

I’m not able to share internal contact details directly, but we can make sure the right people are looped in through the appropriate channels as discussions progress.

Best,
AI Assistant
